source.title: Anthony-de-Rossi-Lasombra-Anti-Michael-Steinbach-WotB-V5

folderPath: SPECIAL CHARACTERS - Ask before handing these out.

Print Sheet: Retainer Gerald Farsen (all computer communication will go through him)
Strength - (Disarm, Grapple, Knock Down, or Pierce the Heart)
Grandchilde of Don Guzman, you are tasked with pushing forward the cause of the Lasombra Antitribu in the Camarilla and to earn the attention of Montano.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
Being charming - being intimidating, whichever is needed
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows: Grandchilde of Don Guzman, you are tasked with pushing forward the cause of the Lasombra Antitribu in the Camarilla and to earn the attention of Montano.

A long time ago, your family were nobles in Italy, one of many such petty princely families, and you can claim most of the more famous ones as ancestors. Consequentally, you've had more than a few of them in the church, because all noble families needed ties there, and you've had more than a few fill in the bureacratic roles needed to make the power of God on Earth run; priests, bishops, a cardinal or two. You were headed there yourself, frankly, with a head for law and a mind for working the system, it only made sense. It was the role you were born to. But fate and war intervened. As Europe descended into chaos, one of your ancient ancestors found you and decided to utilize your talent for her own purposes.

Life as a vampire has proven to be just even more complicated than life in the church, and you've found yourself in the precarious situation of serving a lineage of powerful Sabbat vampires while declaring your allegiances to the hunted Lasombra Antitribu. But you are serving a greater purpose, fulfilling your grandsire Don Guzman's greater calling for the clan, but to do it, you have to use all your abilities and intellect as a mediator on the other side of the equation. Your sire, Rina, has asked that you push forward the cause of the Lasombra Antitribu in the Camarilla. Given the dark times and the threat on the horizon, the Camarilla branch needs to ensure their position in the relative safety of the Ivory Tower, and your role is to ensure that they do so without antagonizing the other clans - particularly the Ventrue, who have been the least inclined to the Keepers. More than that, however, you are to use this position to start gaining the attention of the most powerful of the Antitribu, Montano. Don Guzman is convinced that there are secrets the Methuselah has, ones that he feels will answer his own questions and perhaps may lead to a survival of the blood during the dark times ahead.

Most recently you have been in the court of Milan under Prince Giangaleazzo, a very, very distant relative and the Lasombra Antitribu Prince of Milan and former Sabbat Archbishop. The threat of the Inquisition has had many reconsider temporary relocation. Your sire and grandsire have had ties in Los Angeles, admittedly on the Sabbat side, but you've heard strange things about the city and know that there are rumors there of all sorts of strange things; demons, angels, those who have found true redemption of the curse of Caine, those who whisper that Gehenna is at hand. Perhaps, if anywhere, you can find some of the answers you and your bloodline seek in Los Angeles. At worst, Los Angeles is just enough of a free-wheeling sort of domain that the acceptance of a Lasombra Antitribu by the prince may not cause too many political waves as it would in a more traditional Camarilla city. Beside, Don Guzman has had the Sabbat at heel in the city for decades and you should be relatively safe there....you hope.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Your sire, Don Guzman's childe, who is nominally Sabbat with more than a few antitribu leanings (like a lot) - and is in no way humane.
Ventrue Prince who has agreed to allow you to stay in her domain at the behest of your grandsire after some string pulling - just how did that deal work anyway?

It would not be seemily to your host or her clan to stomp of Ventrue pride. You are a Keeper, but you don't need titles to prove your value. You can prove yourself a leader and influencer in the Camarilla by using your other skills.
Use your growing influence to try and build connections to Montano - as daunting as that is.
Your grandsire is a Noddist scholar with an interest in Golconda. Any tidbits of information or lore to share would be of supreme use to him.

rows: My intent was to keep this church movement from bombing him. And, in theory, it would take 5 Elite actions from the same source to note that he was even manipulating the church into not looking at him. (Each Elite Block requires 2 actions to bypass, so the 5th action would actually get the information that he had influence over the church in the first place.)
Chatted with Rina about the situations with the Camarilla and Sabbat and is aware the elders are calling together conventions to discuss.

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1 Elite Influence to keep myself off the Church's radar.
2 Elite Influence's to block anyone finding out I'm manipulating the Church.
1 DT - Defense of Haven - Put properties in shell names.  (I will be spending 1 or more actions every month to help hide myself)

1 DT - Contact Rina (if she's still around) to try to get info on what's happening from the Sabbat perspective.  Have they lost a city? Have they been attacked?  Did their faith connection seem to help or hurt them any?  Any of their prophets or magic users discover anything?
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
2 - Retainer - Gerald Farsen (Computer) - All phone calls and emails will go through him.
1 General DT - Investigating General (looking for any small/side plot hooks)
1 General DT list to Hunted Flaw
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1 Elite to Block anyone investigating me.
1 Elite Level 2 Action: Gossip and Insider Trading
1 Elite Level 3 Action: Bureaucratic Error - some of the paperwork that might lead to my haven (having already been adjusted two months ago) goes missing.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Retainer 1 - Continues electronic communication “cut out” activities.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1 Elite Action: Block
1 Elite Action: Gossip & Insider Trading - Attempt to find a business that may be a front for the Giovanni in OC.
1 Elite Action: Gossip & Insider Trading - Try to get a mental picture of LA's political and Influence picture leading up to the death of Petrova.  Looking for clues as to why the Assault on LA failed.  Fully aware that it might take several months of actions to find anything of value on this line of questioning, if there's even anything to find.
DT to protect my Retainer who handles all my electronic communication.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Retainer is trashing all his old computer equipment and phones and getting new ones.  I have Resources 2.
DT to travel safely back and forth to the Conclave. (I'm "Hunted" after all.)
Done - I am not doing any more actions.

6 xp - Alt ID 1, 2 - "Anthony di Rossi" Member of the Inconnu
2 xp - Streetwise (should be harder to follow now.)

Send a letter to Independant Alliance, Anarchs (likely Fortier), and a NPM rep staring:
 I, Anthony de Rossi, will assure that representatives from other factions will be safe while visiting the Camarilla Elysium while I am operating with the Authority of the Keeper of Elysium. 
I take this action to provide a space that Kindred can meet to discuss external threats to our way of life.
There will be a stiff screening process to ensure all parties are there to talk about issues as they view them.”
This will go out as my Inconnu AI with my “Bigger Boys Came” merit to dissuade anyone who tries to prove me as not Inconnu.
DT to learn Auspec from a Toreador
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

2 Elite actions to Defend Elysium
1 Elite action to Defend other Rlite Actions.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Contact Abbas of Taledo to discuss Montano

Of the historic Elysium in LA, I’d like to research which sites may have experienced Kindred violence in the past and may justifiably be argue as to be ineligible of being an Elysium moving forward (like Fox theatre had a wall knocked down when the Sheriff attacked a Kindred at an Elysium.)
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

2 Elite actions to build the defenses of Elysia in LA
1 Elite to block anyone from finding out it was my actions
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Retainer - Swapping out his gear for a new set (resources 2)
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
